user.title: Connect to LLM Middleman
user.description: Configure the external agent this conversation agent forwards to.

data_description.name: Display name for this conversation agent
data_description.url: Base URL of the external agent (the /v1/converse path is appended automatically)
data_description.token: Optional bearer token sent as an Authorization header
data_description.system_prompt: Optional system prompt override for the Home Assistant chat log

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure LLM Middleman
reconfigure.description: Update the external agent connection settings.

data_description.name: Display name for this conversation agent
data_description.url: Base URL of the external agent (the /v1/converse path is appended automatically)
data_description.token: Optional bearer token sent as an Authorization header
data_description.system_prompt: Optional system prompt override for the Home Assistant chat log

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the endpoint. Please check the URL.
